title: Nested boolean formula with IN operator computes an incorrect result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(a INT, b VARCHAR(255), c FLOAT, d BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t2(a, b, c, d) VALUES(1, 'test', 3.14, TRUE);
INSERT INTO t2(a, b, c, d) VALUES(0, 'example', 2.71, FALSE);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE (a IN (1, 0) OR (b IS NOT NULL AND c > 2));
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE (d = TRUE AND (a IS NOT NULL OR b IN ('test', 'example')));
key_bug_features: Nested boolean formula with IN operator produces incorrect results
